creator: mezz7@cox.net
text:
Please define the 'does not work'. Recommend you to follow some of  
http://www.freebsd.org/gnome/docs/bugging.html ... Don't follow on  
'gnomelogalyzer.sh', 'GNOME mailing list' and 'GNOME project bug tracking  
system' parts.

Cheers,
Mezz
